html:
THAI SALAD DRESSING

Ingredients

80 ml sunflower or peanut oil

45 ml salted peanuts

30 ml soy sauce

15 ml fish sauce (Nam Pla)

15 ml roughly chopped ginger

10 ml roughly chopped garlic

10 ml fairly finely chopped lemon grass – optional

30 ml water

30 ml brown sugar

20 ml Thai vinegar

5 – 10 ml roughly chopped chilli

5 ml toasted sesame oil

10 ml grated lime zest

15 ml finely chopped coriander leaves

 

Method

  1. Put everything except the lime zest and coriander leaves in a food processor, or use a stick blender, and process until smooth.
  2. Add a little more water if the dressing is too thick.
  3. Stir in the lime zest and coriander leaves and keep in the fridge until needed.

 

Makes about 250 ml of salad dressing
